Amendments2000—Subsec. (b)(1)(A). added subpar. (A) and struck out heading and text of former subpar. (A). Text read as follows: “Part C of the Developmental Disabilities Assistance and Bill of Rights Act.”Pub. L. 106–402

children.text: securing or funding any item, benefit, program, or service furnished for the purpose of causing, or the purpose of assisting in causing, the suicide, euthanasia, or mercy killing of any individual;
compelling any person, institution, governmental entity to provide or fund any item, benefit, program, or service for such purpose; or1So in original. Probably should be “or governmental entity”.1
asserting or advocating a legal right to cause, or to assist in causing, the suicide, euthanasia, or mercy killing of any individual.

children.heading: List of programs to which restrictions apply
children.label: b List of programs to which restrictions apply

children.heading: Protection and advocacy systems under the Developmental Disabilities Assistance and Bill of Rights Act of 2000
children.label: A Protection and advocacy systems under the Developmental Disabilities Assistance and Bill of Rights Act of 2000
children.text: Subtitle C of the Developmental Disabilities Assistance and Bill of Rights Act of 2000 [ et seq.].42 U.S.C. 15041

children.heading: Protection and advocacy systems under the Protection and Advocacy for Mentally Ill Individuals Act
children.label: B Protection and advocacy systems under the Protection and Advocacy for Mentally Ill Individuals Act
children.text: The Protection and Advocacy for Mentally Ill Individuals Act of 1986 [ et seq.].242 U.S.C. 10801See References in Text note below.2

children.heading: Protection and advocacy systems under the Rehabilitation Act of 1973
children.label: C Protection and advocacy systems under the Rehabilitation Act of 1973
children.text: Section 509 of the Rehabilitation Act of 1973 ().29 U.S.C. 794e

children.heading: Ombudsman programs under the Older Americans Act of 1965
children.label: D Ombudsman programs under the Older Americans Act of 1965
children.text: Ombudsman programs under the Older Americans Act of 1965 [ et seq.].42 U.S.C. 3001

children.heading: Legal assistance
children.label: E Legal assistance
children.text: Legal assistance programs under the Legal Services Corporation Act [ et seq.].42 U.S.C. 2996

children.heading: Nonexclusive list
children.label: 2 Nonexclusive list
children.text: Nothing in this subsection shall be construed as limiting the application of subsection (a) to the programs specified in paragraph (1).
